supporting_quote: Gene target quantities obtained by real-time PCR are normalized using either the expression level of GAPDH, a gene whose expression is constant, or by quantifying total RNA using RiboGreen reagent (Molecular Probes, Inc. Eugene, Oreg.).
notes: Isis. CRP mRNA in cytokine-induced Hep3B by quantitative real-time PCR (Table 1+, % relative to untreated control). The qPCR data tables are governed only by the generic either/or boilerplate (GAPDH OR total RNA/RiboGreen); no per-table statement picks one. The explicit 'Data was normalized to GAPDH levels' applies ONLY to the Northern-blot example (PHOSPHORIMAGER, Example 14), not the qPCR tables. Basis left unknown; Isis default is total RNA via RiboGreen.
